title: AWS CloudTrail Detection Reasoning
summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how CloudTrail evidence supports detection reasoning for iam:PassRole, sts:AssumeRole, Lambda updates, Secrets Manager access, KMS decrypt, and workload identity activity.
objectives: Explain how CloudTrail records AWS API activity
Identify high-value identity and workload events
Reason about iam:PassRole and sts:AssumeRole evidence
Connect Lambda update events to workload identity risk
Connect Secrets Manager and KMS events to data access evidence
Differentiate event presence from confirmed impact
Prepare learners for Principal LAB evidence analysis
